name: Recon Raccoon
description: A community-driven memecoin created to protect and empower crypto users, CTOs, and low-marketcap gems. Our ecosystem features weekly crypto talks/hosting services, a “Most Wanted" scam tracker, and a "Portfolio" with partnered projects. We help others succeed through long-term partnerships and services. Weekly Hosting: a weekly hosting service where the team and community come together to talk about crypto and project updates. We will invite guests from rugged projects who want to talk/share insight, invite CTO/low market cap projects to come speak about what they are doing, and give dedicated time for partnered projects to speak on updates for our listeners. Portfolio: webpage highlighting CTOs, low market cap gems, and strong founding teams. Projects must meet internal standards: long-term vision, accountable/transparent leadership, real utility or original design, fair incentives, and consistent execution. Commitment Mechanism: Projects signal alignment with $RCON’s values by voluntarily burning $RCON, demonstrating long-term conviction and shared responsibility. The Marketcap of $RCON dictates burn tiers for each new project. < 250k Marketcap - variable at team discretion 250k - 500k Marketcap - $1,000 USD 500k - 1M Marketcap - $1,500 USD 1M - 2.5M Marketcap - $2,000 USD 2.5M - 5M Marketcap - $3,000 USD 5M - 10M Marketcap - $4,000 USD 10M+ Marketcap - $5,000 USD Most Wanted: A webpage highlighting community-reported concerns, risk indicators, and educational insights related to suspected scams, exploits, or high-risk crypto activity. Content is aggregated from public posts using hashtag #RRMW (Recon Raccoon’s Most Wanted) on X and reflects community observations and opinions for informational purposes only. Inclusion does not imply wrongdoing. Users should independently verify all information.
